scripts.verify-example: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p examples/order-billing/tsconfig.json && node --import tsx packages/runtime/tests/runtime-test.ts && tsx --tsconfig examples/order-billing/tsconfig.json examples/order-billing/src/index.ts && cargo test --workspace && node --import tsx packages/runtime/tests/vite-test.ts && cargo run -p boundra-cli -- check-boundaries --root examples/order-billing --format json && cargo run -p boundra-cli -- graph-domains --root examples/order-billing --format json
